name: HOOK and Slice
about: HOOK & Slice is a premier golf simulator venue located in Alexandria, Minnesota, offering a dual-purpose experience combining advanced golf technology with a full-service bar and pizzeria. The venue features 4 simulator bays equipped with Golfzon technology, providing both entertainment for casual players and serious data analysis for golfers. It operates with a mixed pricing model, offering hourly bay rentals, monthly memberships, and event packages. The facility is designed to accommodate various groups, from families and friends to corporate teams, with a focus on creating an elevated yet accessible environment for all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Industry-leading Golfzon simulators with real-time data and swing analysis
Dual-purpose 'arcade' mode for beginners and advanced mode for serious players
All-in-one venue with on-site dining, drinks, and event hosting capabilities

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen menu featuring oven-fired pizza, sandwiches, salads, and appetizers; specializes in Detroit-style 4-corner pizza
Full bar service with cocktails, beer including local taps like 22 Northmen

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry leading golf simulators with real-time data and swing analysis capabilities

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available, though you're encouraged to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drink are not permitted. However, HOOK & Slice offers a full menu of Detroit-style pizza, sandwiches, salads, and a full bar with beer and cocktails.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Simulator bays are booked in 1-hour blocks, with a 2-hour minimum for private events. Playing 18 holes typically takes 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, HOOK & Slice is designed for golfers and non-golfers of all ages with 'arcade' mode for kids, pool table, shuffleboard, and kid-friendly food options.
